title: Language Change - Consecutive language change
scenario: Verify consecutive language changes on a headset via Device Settings, including software update flow, complete successfully.
steps: Verify the message about selecting a language for voice prompts and alerts is displayed
Tap the current language to view the scrollable list of supported languages
Verify a popup appears with a message about needing to update software to apply the language change (audio only), along with 'Later' and 'Update now' buttons
Verify the language change completes and the user is directed to the Home Screen
Repeat the entire process to verify consecutive language changes are successful
expected: Language change completes successfully and user is directed to the Home Screen. Consecutive language changes are all successful.
